# Copilot Instructions For pqforge

- Treat `doc/` as the canonical documentation root.
- Keep generated visibility files in sync with `dart run tool/visibility/generate_visibility.dart`.
- Prefer named recipe helpers over hand-rolled message framing.
- Use wrapped secret keys for CLI examples.
- Do not claim FIPS validation, CMVP validation, certification, hard constant-time behavior, or hard memory erasure.
- Do not add RC4 or unauthenticated encryption.
